text: The entire width between the boundary lines of every way publicly maintained when any part thereof is open to the use of the public for purposes of vehicular travel.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 148 — Street

The entire width between the boundary lines of every way publicly maintained when any part thereof is open to the use of the public for purposes of vehicular travel.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
